info.title: LP Agent Open API
info.description:
Public API for LP Agent

**Authentication**

All endpoints require an API key passed via the `x-api-key` header.

get.summary: Get opening LP positions for an owner
get.description: Retrieves current liquidity pool positions that are open for a specific wallet owner

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: Wallet address of the position owner

400.description: Bad request - owner parameter is required

get.summary: Get historical LP positions for an owner
get.description: Retrieves historical liquidity pool positions for a specific wallet owner

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: Wallet address of the position owner

400.description: Bad request - owner parameter is required

get.summary: Get overview metrics for LP positions
get.description: Retrieves comprehensive overview and metrics for liquidity pool positions of a specific owner

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: Wallet address of the position owner

parameters.name: protocol
parameters.description: Protocol to filter by (e.g., meteora, orca)

total_pnl.description: Total profit and loss with time ranges

avg_inflow_native.description: Average inflow in native token with time ranges

total_fee_native.description: Total fees in native token with time ranges

total_pnl_native.description: Total PnL in native token with time ranges

win_lp_native.description: Number of winning LP positions in native token

closed_lp.description: Closed LP positions with time ranges

win_rate_native.description: Win rate in native token with time ranges

expected_value_native.description: Expected value in native token with time ranges

roi_avg_inflow_native.description: ROI based on average inflow in native token

avg_pos_profit_native.description: Average position profit in native token

avg_monthly_profit_percent_native.description: Average monthly profit percentage in native token

avg_monthly_pnl_native.description: Average monthly PnL in native token

avg_monthly_inflow_native.description: Average monthly inflow in native token

400.description: Bad request - owner parameter is required

get.description: Retrieves transaction logs for liquidity pool positions. Can fetch logs for a specific position or for all positions of an owner.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: Wallet address of the position owner (required for public access)

amount0.description: Amount of token0 involved in the transaction

amount1.description: Amount of token1 involved in the transaction

price0.description: Price of token0 at time of transaction

price1.description: Price of token1 at time of transaction

strategyType.description: Strategy type used for the position

400.description: Bad request - position or owner parameter is required

message.example: position or owner parameter is required

get.summary: Get token balances for a wallet address
get.description: Returns all token balances (SOL and SPL tokens) for the specified wallet address

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: The wallet address to get balances for

parameters.name: ca
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of token contract addresses to filter by

rawBalance.description: Token balance in raw format (smallest unit)

400.description: Invalid request - owner parameter is required

get.description: Retrieve a list of pools with filtering, sorting, and pagination

parameters.name: feeTVLInterval
parameters.description: Time interval for fee/TVL ratio calculation

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by pool name or token address

token0_stats.description: Token X trading stats from Jupiter

token1_stats.description: Token Y trading stats from Jupiter

get.summary: Get detailed information for a specific pool
get.description: Retrieve token info, liquidity visualization, and pool data for a specific pool

tokenInfo.description: Tuple of two token info results [tokenX, tokenY]

poolStats.description: Pool stats from database (tvl, fee, volumes, etc.)

feeStats.description: Hourly fee stats for the last 7 days

get.summary: Get positions for a specific pool
get.description: Retrieve all positions associated with a specific pool along with position state and pricing info

positionState.description: Bin data for each position (DLMM pools only)

get.summary: Get onchain statistics for a specific pool
get.description: Retrieve aggregated statistics including total open positions, input values, and unique users for a pool

total_input_native.description: Total input value in native token

404.description: No data found for the pool

get.summary: Get top LPers for a pool
get.description: Retrieve ranked LP providers for a pool with pagination and sorting

get.summary: Get LP positions revenue for an owner
get.description: Retrieve revenue and PnL data over time for a specific wallet owner. Only 7D and 1M ranges are available.

parameters.name: owner
parameters.description: Wallet address of the position owner

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: Time range filter (only 7D and 1M are available)

close_day.description: Date of the revenue data point

total_invested.description: Total capital invested at end of period (USD)

total_invested_native.description: Total capital invested in native token

cumulative_pnl.description: Running cumulative PnL from start date (USD)

cumulative_pnl_native.description: Running cumulative PnL in native token

max_invested.description: Maximum capital deployed in this period (USD)

max_invested_native.description: Maximum capital deployed in native token

pnl_percent.description: PnL as percentage of max invested (USD)
